zh.lifeSummary: 當Maude Perrott於1459年出生在威爾士布洛可爾哈洛爾德斯頓 韋斯特時，她的父親William Thomas Perrot26歲，母親Jane Wogan19歲。她於大約1485年與William Adams在英國威爾斯布洛可爾布洛可 聖 瑪麗結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世在威爾士布洛可爾洛福斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maude Perrott于1459年出生在威尔士布洛可爾哈洛爾德斯頓 韋斯特时，她的父亲William Thomas Perrot26岁，母亲Jane Wogan19岁。她于大约1485年与William Adams在英国威尔斯布洛可爾布洛可 聖 瑪麗结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世在威尔士布洛可爾洛福斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Perrott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Welsh and Irish: variant of   Parrott  .
In some cases possibly also an altered form of French   Perrot  .

variants.name: Parrott
meanings: English: from a short form of the Middle English personal name Peres, Peris (from Old French Pierre; see Pearce ) + the diminutive suffixes -et, -ot.
English: habitational name from North Perrott in Somerset or South Perrott in Dorset (both named from the River Parret on which they stand, the etymology of which name is uncertain).
Altered form of French Parrot or of its variant Parot or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname, reflecting the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Maude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant of   Maud  , the usual spelling of the name in North America.

en.lifeSummary: When Maude Perrott was born in 1459, in Haroldston West, Pembrokeshire, Wales, her father, William Thomas Perrot, was 26 and her mother, Jane Wogan, was 19. She married William Adams about 1485, in Pembroke St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in Loveston, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maude Perrott est née en 1459, à Haroldston West, Pembrokeshire, Galles, son père, William Thomas Perrot, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Jane Wogan, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William Adams environ 1485, à Pembroke St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée à Loveston, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maude Perrott 1459 in Haroldston West, Pembrokeshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Thomas Perrot 26 und ihre Mutter Jane Wogan 19. Sie hat um 1485 in Pembroke St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom William Adams geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in Loveston, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

Lei sposato William Adams circa 1485, nel Pembroke St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel Loveston, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Maude Perrottが1459年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアハロルドストン ウエストで生まれた時，父William Thomas Perrotは26歳，母Jane Woganは19歳であった。約1485年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロク スト マリーでWilliam Adamsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女はウェールズペンブロケシュアイアロベストンで死去した。

ko.Penfro, Pembrokeshire, Wales: 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크 스트 메리
ko.lifeSummary: Maude Perrott(이)가 1459년 웨일스 p브로케실르 하로드스턴 웨스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Thomas Perrot(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jane Wogan(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 대략 1485년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크 스트 메리에서 William Adams(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스 p브로케실르 러베스턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maude Perrott nasceu em 1459, em Haroldston West, Pembrokeshire, Gales, seu pai, William Thomas Perrot, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Jane Wogan, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William Adams aproximadamente 1485, em Pembroke St Mary, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em Loveston, Pembrokeshire, Gales.

ru.Penfro, Pembrokeshire, Wales: пемброк ст мэри, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maude Perrott родилась в 1459 г. в местности харолдстон вест, пемброкешир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени William Thomas Perrot было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Jane Wogan, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Adams около 1485 г. в местности пемброк ст мэри, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в местности лавестон, пемброкешир, Уэльс.
